package.name: ikt_pose_commander
package.description: Target-pose -> joint motion bridge for the cartesian_controllers_toolkit. A node that accepts a Cartesian target pose on a topic, solves it with the advisory ikt_inverse_kinematics solver (in-process), and ACTUALLY drives the arm — either by sending a single speed-limited trajectory to the arm's JointTrajectoryController (default, safe) or by streaming joint setpoints to its forward_position_controller (optional). Unlike the IK package, this node commands the robot; it is therefore safety-gated (starts disabled, rejects unreachable / large-jump solutions, limits speed, and holds on stale input).
